title: Defending migrants, Pope Leo calls for ‘legal’ paths, a nod to fraught politics
summary_full: As he finished a seven-day visit, Pope Leo articulated a fuller position on migration, including the "right" of nations to protect their borders, that his critics often ignore.
summary_public: As he finished a seven-day visit, Pope Leo articulated a fuller position on migration, including the "right" of nations to protect their borders, that his critics often ignore.
